rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a new DCE-based multi-mediator choice model for product positioning in bread, while the cited paper is a behavioral pricing study on promotional credit and double mental discounting; the notes show little direct methodological or theoretical dependence between them. With only a single DOI match and no citation-context text indicating use as a key method, benchmark, or foundation, this looks like a likely background/domain mention rather than a substantive citation.
